recommendations.title: The Legend of Zorro
recommendations.overview: Despite trying to keep his swashbuckling to a minimum, a threat to California's pending statehood causes the adventure-loving Don Alejandro de la Vega and his wife, Elena, to take action.

recommendations.title: Cast a Deadly Spell
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Mystery, Comedy, Horror, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: In a fantastical 1940s where magic is used by everyone, a hard-boiled detective investigates the theft of a mystical tome.

recommendations.title: Dirty Angels
recommendations.overview: During the United States' 2021 withdrawal from Afghanistan, a group of female soldiers posing as medical relief are sent back in to rescue a group of kidnapped teenagers caught between ISIS and the Taliban.

recommendations.title: Cleaner
recommendations.overview: When a group of radical activists take over an energy company's annual gala, seizing 300 hostages, an ex-soldier turned window cleaner suspended 50 storeys up on the outside of the building must save those trapped inside, including her older brother.

recommendations.title: The Foreigner

recommendations.title: The Cincinnati Kid
recommendations.overview: An up-and-coming poker player tries to prove himself in a high-stakes match against a long-time master of the game.
